Editing and Validation.description: Tools for editing, validating, and parsing Thing Descriptions in various programming environments

tools.name: Thing Description Playground
tools.description: Reference validation suite including OpenAPI generation, linting, and other utilities

tools.name: Eclipse edi{TD}or
tools.description: This project aims to make creating W3C Thing Description (TD) instances and Thing Model (TM) easy by providing a platform-independent ediTDor tool

tools.name: TD code
tools.description: Visual Studio Code extension for validation and code snippets

tools.name: Java API for Thing Descriptions of WoT (JDTs)
tools.description: The JDT is an ORM implementation of the current Thing Description model standardised by the W3C Web of Things group

tools.name: Eclipse Ditto :: WoT :: Model
tools.description: This module contains a W3C WoT (Web of Things) Java model following the Web of Things (WoT) Thing Description 1.1

tools.name: wot-td
tools.description: Rust crate to produce and consume Web Of Things Thing Descriptions

tools.name: Golang ThingDescription
tools.description: This is a Golang package containing all structs to represent a ThingDescription in code and also to serialize and deserialize it

tools.name: tmtd
tools.description: Transpiling thing-model to thing-descriptions

tools.name: Wot-DTDL-Converter
tools.description: A two way converter for TM and DTDL files

Runtimes for TD Exposers.description: Libraries implementing a WoT Runtime for building Things according to WoT paradigms

tools.name: Eclipse Thingweb node-wot
tools.description: The Web of Things (WoT) tackles IoT fragmentation by extending standardized web technologies

tools.name: Eclipse Ditto :: WoT
tools.description: This module contains models and implementation of the W3C "Web of Things" (WoT) integration of Eclipse Ditto

tools.name: SANE Web of Things Servient
tools.description: This project contains an implementation of the W3C Web of Things (WoT) architecture written in Java

tools.name: wot-serve
tools.description: Rust crate to serve Web Of Things Things

tools.name: wotpy
tools.description: Wotpy is an experimental implementation of a W3C WoT Runtime and the W3C WoT Scripting API in Python

Runtimes for TD Consumers.description: Libraries implementing a WoT Runtime for consuming Things and building custom applications

tools.name: Eclipse Thingweb node-wot
tools.description: The Web of Things (WoT) tackles IoT fragmentation by extending standardized web technologies

tools.name: Node generator for Node-RED
tools.description: Node generator is a command line tool to generate Node-RED nodes based on various sources such as an OpenAPI (Swagger) document, a Node-RED Function node, or a Web Of Things Thing description

tools.name: dart_wot
tools.description: Dart implementation of W3C WoT supporting HTTP and CoAP

tools.name: SANE Web of Things Servient
tools.description: This project contains an implementation of the W3C Web of Things (WoT) architecture written in Java

tools.name: kotlin-wot
tools.description: Kotlin-wot is a framework designed to enable developers to implement Web of Things (WoT) servers and clients in Kotlin

tools.name: WoT.Net
tools.description: A .NET Standard 2.0 implementation of the W3C Web of Things (WoT) Scripting API, inspired by node-wot

tools.name: wotpy
tools.description: Wotpy is an experimental implementation of a W3C WoT Runtime and the W3C WoT Scripting API in Python

TD Directories.description: Services hosting a Thing Description Directory implementing the W3C WoT Discovery specification

tools.name: TinyIoT Thing Directory
tools.description: This is an implementation of the W3C Web of Things (WoT) Thing Description Directory (TDD), a registry of Thing Descriptions

tools.name: WoT Hive
tools.description: This implementation is compliant with the standard specification but aims at providing enriched features thanks to the usage of other W3C standards related to Semantic Web technologies

tools.name: Domus TDD API
tools.description: A Python and SPARQL based Thing Description Directory API compliant to: https://www.w3.org/TR/wot-discovery/

tools.name: wot-discovery
tools.description: Tiny implementation of WoT Discovery

tools.name: Zion
tools.description: Zion employs the best open-source technologies to provide a scalable TDD service

Development Environments and UIs.description: Tools aiding WoT application development with user interfaces and other utilities

tools.name: WoT Application Manager
tools.description: Jumpstart your WoT application!

tools.name: WoT Wrench
tools.description: A web app to control Web of Things devices

tools.name: Thing Model Catalog CLI
tools.description: Find, use and contribute device descriptions for industrial IoT devices!

tools.name: Thing Control Panel
tools.description: Admin control panel in React for Things having a standard WoT Thing Description with HTTP protocol binding or implemented with hololinked

tools.name: BLAST
tools.description: Block Applications For Things

tools.name: W-ADE
tools.description: Wade is an API development environment for Web of Things that was designed for the W3C WoT building blocks

tools.name: wot-fxui
tools.description: Desktop, mobile, and browser UI for interacting with Things via TDs

WoT Software and Middleware.description: Deployable software providing functions like gateway, proxying, simulation, and testing

tools.name: sayWoT!
tools.description: Industrial-grade implementation integrating devices into Siemens software

tools.name: Web of Things Test Bench
tools.description: Tests a WoT Thing by executing interactions automatically, based on its Thing Description

tools.name: WebThings Gateway
tools.description: WebThings Gateway is a self-hosted web application for monitoring and controlling a building over the web

tools.name: UA Edge Translator
tools.description: An industrial connectivity edge reference application translating from proprietary protocols to OPC UA leveraging the W3C Web of Things (WoT) thing descriptions via the new WoT-Connectivity specification

tools.name: VO-WoT
tools.description: VO-WoT is an experimental implementation of a W3C WoT Runtime and the W3C WoT Scripting API in Python

tools.name: WoT Anything
tools.description: Web of Things server to integrate APIs or lots of virtual things

tools.name: Shadow Thing
tools.description: Creates and deploys a Thing based on its TD

Online Things.description: Publicly accessible Things for testing Consumer applications and learning TD communication

tools.name: Eclipse Thingweb - Online Things for Testing
tools.description: Publicly accessible test Things hosted by Eclipse Thingweb

tools.name: Thing Model Catalog Repository
tools.description: This repository holds Thing Models for Siemens devices published by Siemens for public use

tools.name: Eclipse AASX Package Explorer
tools.description: Eclipse AASX Package Explorer is a C# based viewer and editor for the Asset Administration Shell

tools.name: Eclipse LMOS
